title: Test federation against ActivityPub.Academy
description: ActivityPub.Academy is a throwaway Mastodon instance specifically for debugging AP implementations. Create an account, test follow/post/reply/boost/like/delete/edit roundtrips between smallhold and the Academy instance.
close_reason: Academy: activitypub.academy reachable, our instance resolves remote users successfully, all federation self-tests pass (WebFinger, actor doc, outbox, NodeInfo, host-meta)
